about.title: About us
about.subtitle: Twenty-five years in the industry, fifteen years of corporate-scale manufacturing: solutions, not just products.
about.intro: Karpol Polyurethane is a B2B manufacturing partner in rubber and polyurethane coatings that engineers and procurement teams can rely on. We combine a quarter-century of field know-how with corporate production discipline to deliver proven solutions—sized, loaded and specified for your operating conditions, not just a catalog line.
about.technicalText: We engineer polyurethane and rubber formulations for abrasion, chemical exposure, impact and thermal cycling. Coating thickness, hardness and elasticity are optimised per application; quality is repeatable from production through dispatch. Our technical team reads the problem through process data—not only part numbers—so you target less downtime and longer service life.
about.solutionsTitle: Solution partnership from marble machinery to conveyor lines
about.solutionsText: Our core focus is spare parts for marble processing machines and a broad product range: grinding strips, vibration dampers and custom coatings that extend equipment life and shorten line stoppages. For conveyor systems we produce high-durability rollers on dedicated injection machines—reliable transfer under heavy load, high speed and harsh environments. In both areas we work as a process partner, aligning material, dimensions and lead time with your project.
about.why1Text: Twenty-five years in the sector and fifteen years under a corporate structure—scalable capacity and consistent quality.
about.why2Text: Data-driven material selection, made-to-measure production and clear technical dialogue—accelerated decisions with 3D validation tools.
about.why3Text: Broad range for marble and conveyor applications, fast ramp-up and lead-time planning tailored to your project.

errors.convSectionNegative: Cuff lengths exceed total length — no room for convolutions.
errors.convOdMin: Peak OD must be greater than valley ID.
errors.convCount: At least one convolution is required.
errors.icGeDis: Inner diameter must be less than outer diameter.
errors.merkezGeDis: PCD must be less than outer diameter.
errors.merkezLeIc: PCD must be greater than inner diameter.
errors.delikTooLarge: Bolt hole does not fit in body.
errors.kucukGeDis: Waist diameter must be less than outer diameter.
